mapper.select:
SELECT * FROM ( SELECT ROWNUM AS rnum, T1.* FROM ( SELECT NTC_NO, NTC_TTL, NTC_CN, NTC_REG, NTC_REG_HM, NTC_MOD, NTC_MOD_HM, REG_NO, MOD_NO FROM NOTICE WHERE 1 = 1
AND NTC_TTL LIKE '%' || #{searchWord} || '%'
AND NTC_CN LIKE '%' || #{searchWord} || '%'
-- 긴급 중요 공지 상단 고정 로직 ORDER BY CASE WHEN NTC_TTL LIKE '[긴급]%' THEN 0 WHEN NTC_TTL LIKE '[중요]%' THEN 1 ELSE 2 END , NTC_NO DESC ) T1 WHERE ROWNUM <= #{pageSize} * (#{pageNo} - 1) + #{pageSize} ) TT1 WHERE rnum >= #{pageSize} * (#{pageNo} - 1) + 1
mapper.insert:
SELECT SEQ_NTC_NO.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO notice (NTC_NO, NTC_TTL, NTC_CN, NTC_REG, NTC_REG_HM, NTC_MOD, NTC_MOD_HM, REG_NO, MOD_NO) VALUES (#{ntcNo}, #{ntcTtl}, #{ntcCn}, TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD'), TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'HH24MI'), TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD'), TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'HH24MI'), #{regNo}, #{modNo})
mapper.select: SELECT NTC_NO, NTC_TTL, NTC_CN, NTC_REG, NTC_REG_HM, NTC_MOD, NTC_MOD_HM, REG_NO, MOD_NO FROM NOTICE WHERE NTC_NO = #{ntcNo}
mapper.update: UPDATE NOTICE SET NTC_TTL = #{ntcTtl}, NTC_CN = #{ntcCn}, NTC_MOD = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD'), NTC_MOD_HM = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'HH24MI'), MOD_NO = #{modNo} WHERE NTC_NO = #{ntcNo}
